'''Tholon''' was a<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> located within the [[Star system/Legends|star system]] of the [[Tholon system/Legends|same name]].<ref name="EAOC" /> A desolate rock world with rich deposits of various [[Ore/Legends|ores]], it was the first planet discovered by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Casti Tholon]]<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref>

Tholon was employed by [[Rim Commercial Mining]] at the [[Time/Legends|time]], which named the planet after her. The Wild Space world proved very profitable for Rim Commercial Mining, establishing it as one of the leading [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] companies, and was considered the most important planet Tholon had ever discovered.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tholon was first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Tholon system, and therefore the planet Tholon, in grid square H-17.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
